compiled_state.title: Pre-existing test failures prevent run-all.sh exit 0

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: tests/hooks/test-merge-conflict-regression.sh, tests/scripts/test-discover-agents.sh, tests/scripts/test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh, tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh, config/agent-routing.conf, plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh, tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh, tests/run-all.sh; exemplars read: none) ✓ Root causes: (1) merge-conflict-regression is at tests/hooks/ not tests/scripts/ — passes already. (2) discover-agents expects 9 stderr lines but routing conf has 10 categories. (3) design-approve.sh uses ../ relative path. (4) playwright test exceeds 60s timeout.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ (pre-existing failing tests — no new tests needed)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ Fixes: (1) test-discover-agents.sh: updated expected stderr log count from 9 to 10 matching routing conf. (2) design-approve.sh: replaced ../ relative path with CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT-based resolution. (3) test-playwright-cli-validation.sh: shared browser session to reduce total runtime from ~90s to ~45s. (4) merge-conflict-regression: passes already, no fix needed.
comments.author: Test
